header_title.description: Zita reApp rinoratidzwa musoro. App yekuwana mabikirwo enyika dzose.

header_subtitle.description: Mutsetse unoratidzwa pasi pezita reapp musoro.

home_page_hero_title.description: Musoro mukuru panguva yepamusoro peji remaoko.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Tarisa mabikirwo echokwadi kubva kumakicheni enyika dzose
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Mutsetse uri pasi pemusoro mukuru papeji remaoko.

home_page_featured_title.description: Musoro wechikamu unoratidzwa pamusoro pegridhi yemakadhi emabikirwo.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Nguva yekubika inoratidzwa pakadhi rembikirwo. {minutes} inoshandurwa kuti ive nhamba yema miniti.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Chiratidzo chinoratidzwa pamberi pechikamu chekuoma pakadhi rembikirwo.

recipe_card_easy.description: Chiratidzo chekuoma chinoratidza kuti resipi iri nyore.

recipe_card_medium.description: Chiratidzo chekuoma chinoratidza kuti resipi iri pakati pekuoma.

recipe_card_hard.description: Chiratidzo chekuoma chinoratidza kuti resipi iri yakaoma.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Muto wemapfupa enhuku une nyama yakaoma, zai rakabikwa zvinyoronyoro, uye nhozi nyowani.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Pizza yeNeapolitan yechinyakare ine matomatisi eSan Marzano, mozzarella itsva, uye basil.

recipe_card_tacos_name.description: Zita re resipi yeTacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos dzemhuru dzakanyikwa nemupineapuro, cilantro, uye hanyanisi pamakapu echibage.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Tsanangudzo ye resipi yeTacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Huku yakanaka iri musosi yetamatisi inotapira nebhata uye zvinonhuwira zvinofadza.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Nhozi dzakakangwa dzemupunga dzine huku yegungwa, tofu, nzungu, uye muto wetamarind.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crepes dzakatetepa, dzakatsetseka dzakazadzwa neNutella, ma strawberries matsva, uye kirimu yakarohwa.
